title: Phase 3: Frontend API client
description:
Create frontend API client for explorer endpoints.

## Pre-Implementation Checklist (MANDATORY)
- [ ] Read `docs/explorer-architecture.md` → API Contract
- [ ] Phase 2 checkpoint PASSED
- [ ] Review existing API client: `frontend/lib/api.ts`

## Deliverables
Create: `frontend/lib/api/explorer.ts`

## Required Functions
```typescript
fetchExplorerEntries(projectId, filters) -> ExplorerResponse
fetchExplorerStats(projectId) -> StatsResponse
fetchExplorerEntry(projectId, type, path) -> EntryResponse
fetchExplorerChildren(projectId, type, parentPath) -> ChildrenResponse
triggerExplorerScan(projectId, type?) -> ScanResponse
```

## Rules
- Consistent error handling
- Type-safe responses (use types from components/explorer/types.ts)
- No business logic

## Blocked By
summitflow-7af (Phase 2 checkpoint)

## Parent
summitflow-bye

title: Phase 1: Build explorer storage layer
description:
Create the storage layer for ALL explorer database operations.

## Pre-Implementation Checklist (MANDATORY)
- [ ] Read `docs/explorer-architecture.md` → Backend Architecture
- [ ] Verify DB schema exists
- [ ] Review existing storage patterns: `ls backend/app/storage/`

## Deliverables
Create: `backend/app/storage/explorer.py`

## Required Functions
```python
def upsert_entries(project_id: str, entry_type: str, entries: list) -> int
def get_entries(project_id: str, filters: dict) -> list
def get_entry(project_id: str, entry_type: str, path: str) -> dict | None
def get_children(project_id: str, entry_type: str, parent_path: str) -> list
def get_stats(project_id: str) -> dict
def delete_entries(project_id: str, entry_type: str) -> int
```

## Rules
- ALL explorer DB operations go here
- No direct DB queries in services
- Use parameterized queries (no SQL injection)

## Blocked By
summitflow-75c (DB schema)

## Parent
summitflow-bye

title: Checkpoint: Phase 2 DRY audit
description:
Audit Phase 2 scanner implementations for DRY compliance.

## Checklist
- [ ] No duplicate code across type scanners
- [ ] All type scanners extend BaseScanner properly
- [ ] Shared logic extracted to base.py or health.py
- [ ] Each type file < 200 lines
- [ ] Type-specific logic ONLY in types/ directory
- [ ] Tests exist for each scanner

## Common Violations to Check
- Duplicate health calculation logic
- Duplicate DB query patterns
- Similar parsing/transformation code
- Repeated error handling

## If Violations Found
Create bug beads and fix before Phase 3.

## Blocked By
summitflow-onc, summitflow-ccl, summitflow-iij, summitflow-ceg (all scanners)

## Parent
summitflow-bye

title: Phase 1: Build base scanner service
description:
Create the base scanner service with shared scanning logic.

## Pre-Implementation Checklist (MANDATORY)
- [ ] Read `docs/explorer-architecture.md` → Backend Architecture
- [ ] Verify DB schema exists: `psql -d summitflow -c '\d explorer_entries'`
- [ ] Search existing scanners: `ls backend/app/services/`

## Deliverables
Create directory structure:
```
backend/app/services/explorer/
├── __init__.py      # Public interface
├── base.py          # BaseScanner abstract class
├── models.py        # Pydantic models (ExplorerEntry, etc.)
├── health.py        # Shared health check logic
└── types/           # Empty dir for type implementations
    └── __init__.py  # Type registry
```

## Key Interfaces
- `BaseScanner.scan()` - abstract, returns list[ExplorerEntry]
- `BaseScanner.save()` - shared, calls storage layer
- `BaseScanner.get_health_status()` - shared with override option

## Tests
- `backend/tests/services/test_explorer_base.py`

## Blocked By
summitflow-75c (DB schema)

## Parent
summitflow-bye

title: Phase 1: Build unified API router
description:
Create single API router for all explorer endpoints.

## Pre-Implementation Checklist (MANDATORY)
- [ ] Read `docs/explorer-architecture.md` → API Contract
- [ ] Verify base scanner exists
- [ ] Verify storage layer exists
- [ ] Review existing API patterns: `ls backend/app/api/`

## Deliverables
Create: `backend/app/api/explorer.py`

## Endpoints
| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | /api/projects/{id}/explorer | List entries with filters |
| GET | /api/projects/{id}/explorer/stats | Get summary statistics |
| GET | /api/projects/{id}/explorer/{type}/{path:path} | Get single entry |
| POST | /api/projects/{id}/explorer/scan | Trigger scan |
| GET | /api/projects/{id}/explorer/children | Get children for tree |

## Response Shape
Consistent across all types - see architecture doc.

## Rules
- Delegate to services, no business logic here
- Validate request params
- Format response consistently

## Blocked By
summitflow-7hd (base scanner), summitflow-3iw (storage)

## Parent
summitflow-bye

title: Phase 3: Frontend data hooks

- `useExplorerData.ts` - data fetching with react-query
- `useExplorerState.ts` - UI state (expanded, selected)
- `useExplorerFilters.ts` - filter/sort state

## Hook Responsibilities
| Hook | Does | Does NOT |
|------|------|----------|
| useExplorerData | Fetch, cache, refetch | UI state |
| useExplorerState | Expansion, selection | Data fetching |
| useExplorerFilters | Filter values, sorting | Fetch or UI state |

title: Epic: Explorer Foundation Rebuild
description:
Ground-up rebuild of unified Explorer for codebase exploration.

**Types:** Files, Database, Tasks, Endpoints (merged Sitemap+API)

**Architecture:**
- Single `explorer_entries` table with type-specific JSONB metadata
- Unified scanner service with base class + type implementations
- Single API router with consistent contract
- Frontend shell (exists) with type-specific renderers

**Phases:**
0. Architecture (BLOCKING) - schema, interfaces, doc review
1. Backend Foundation - DB, base scanner, API
2. Type Implementations - Files, Database, Tasks, Endpoints scanners
3. Frontend Integration - Wire to API, type renderers
4. Migration & Cleanup - Move data, deprecate old tables

**Key Docs:**
- `docs/explorer-architecture.md` (authoritative)
- `.claude/rules/explorer-architecture.md` (enforcement)

**Replaces:** summitflow-q3n (incremental approach → ground-up rebuild)

title: Phase 2: Endpoints scanner implementation
description:
Implement EndpointScanner extending BaseScanner. MERGES sitemap + api_scanner.

## Pre-Implementation Checklist (MANDATORY)
- [ ] Read `docs/explorer-architecture.md` → Endpoints metadata schema
- [ ] Phase 1 checkpoint PASSED
- [ ] Review existing api_scanner: `backend/app/services/api_scanner.py`
- [ ] Review existing sitemap: `backend/app/api/sitemap.py`
- [ ] Identify what to merge from each

## Deliverables
Create: `backend/app/services/explorer/types/endpoints.py`

## Requirements
- Extend BaseScanner
- MERGE logic from:
  - api_scanner.py (code analysis: source file, function, dependencies)
  - sitemap.py (health checks: http_status, response_time, console_errors)
- Store results in explorer_entries with type='endpoint'
- Support both API routes AND frontend pages
- Include: method, port, source_file, health, dependencies

## Key Decision
This scanner does BOTH code analysis AND health checks.
Health checks are expensive - consider async/background.

## Blocked By
summitflow-hxu (Phase 1 checkpoint)

## Parent
summitflow-bye

title: Epic: Unified Explorer UI for Files, DB, and Tasks
description:
Build consistent Windows Explorer-style hierarchical views for Files, DB, and Tasks tabs in SummitFlow.

**Problem:**
- Files tab lost explorer functionality during migration (now too rudimentary)
- DB tab needs migration from portfolio-ai with improved UI
- Tasks tab needs migration, replacing Workflows with better explorer view

**Goal:**
Unified visual language across all three tabs:
- Hierarchical tree navigation (left pane)
- Details/content panel (right pane)  
- Consistent expand/collapse, icons, selection behavior
- SummitFlow phosphor-green/dark theme

**Approach:**
1. Discovery phase - review old implementations, document patterns
2. Design phase - visual diagrams, shared components spec
3. Implementation - build sequentially to maintain consistency

**Note:** Use frontend-design plugin for all UI work.

**Replaces:** summitflow-y6s.1 (Celery task explorer)

title: Epic: SummitFlow Platform Extraction
description:
Extract dev tooling from portfolio-ai into standalone SummitFlow platform.

**Goal:** Reduce portfolio-ai by ~30%, create reusable dev platform.

**Plan:** ~/.claude/plans/sparkling-meandering-cascade.md

**Phases:**
1. Foundation (repo scaffold, core schema, project registration) - DONE
2. Sitemap extraction (first vertical slice) - DONE
3. Features/Evidence/Vision extraction (main value) - IN PROGRESS
4. Files + remaining tools extraction
5. Commands integration

**Deferred to v1.1:** Auto Mode, AI Reviews, OAuth terminal, Agent Hub

**Migrated from:** portfolio-ai-43g
notes: Phase 4 (Files + remaining tools) now handled by summitflow-bye (Explorer Foundation Rebuild) - ground-up rebuild with DRY architecture instead of incremental migration.

title: Cross-project Celery task explorer
description:
Hierarchical task viewer for all registered projects.

**Features:**
- Tree view showing task dependencies (parent > children)
- Expandable task groups (by schedule, by type, by status)
- Details panel showing:
  - Task: schedule, last run, duration, dependencies, logs
  - Group: task count, success rate, next scheduled
- Visual dependency tree (what blocks what)
- Filter by status, schedule type, recent failures
- Cross-project view (see tasks from portfolio-ai, summitflow, etc.)

**Reference:** Reverted commit 6bff7e1 in portfolio-ai (portfolio-ai-0hl)

**Why SummitFlow:** This is dev tooling for understanding task architecture across projects, not operational monitoring.

title: Sitemap UI polish
description:
Create /sitemap page and polish UI to match SummitFlow design aesthetic.

**Current state:**
- Sidebar links to /sitemap (404)
- SitemapTab component exists and works at /projects/[id]
- alert() calls need toast replacement

**Work:**
1. Create /app/sitemap/page.tsx as standalone sitemap view (cross-project or project selector)
2. Replace alert() calls with proper toast notifications
3. Use frontend-design skill for design consistency
4. Ensure matches phosphor-green/dark theme

**Migrated from:** portfolio-ai-gil

title: Agent Hub: Centralized AI orchestration
description:
Centralized AI orchestration hub for SummitFlow.

**Features (from portfolio-ai Agent Hub):**
- Multi-agent chat interface (Claude, Gemini)
- Context injection from current page/feature
- Evidence capture integration
- Browser automation for testing
- Pre-populated prompts based on context

**Why SummitFlow:** Agent Hub is dev tooling - helps developers interact with AI for debugging, testing, and exploration. Not user-facing functionality.

**Status:** DEFERRED to v1.1
**Blocked:** Requires planning session to define cross-project architecture
